suggestions: For the next 4-6 hours, keep sweet drinks/juice as "with food only" (not solo) so this juice-tail can fade without banning sugar forever.
If you feel the half-hourly ‘push' again: one 5-8 minute sit, let gas/juice pass, then get up - no repeat sits, no pushing.
If you're craving sandwiches: start with a simple ham-and-toast sandwich (no mustard, no raw lettuce) once tonight's chicken trial lands.
summary: Peter, you're actually in a strong place on day 15: you made a proper large Bristol 4 at 11:54 and you're still at zero accidents - that's your colon forming stool, not failing. The 14:28 ‘gas + juices' looks like a watery tail/rectal sensitivity phase, and today's new suspect is the milk from this morning (even lactose-free skim can do that this early). Let's use shopping day to your advantage: tonight we bring back real savoury protein (plain chicken), and the exciting trial is mashed potato at 18:00 so your safe list starts feeling like real life again.
